steps.title: Multiply the coefficients
steps.content:
The numerical factors are $6$ and $9$. Multiplying them gives the coefficient of the final product:
$$
6\cdot9=54
$$

steps.title: Combine like variables
steps.content:
There are two $m$ factors and two $n$ factors, so the variable part is $m^2n^2$:
$$
m\cdot m=m^2
$$
$$
n\cdot n=n^2
$$

steps.title: Write the product
steps.content: Putting the coefficient and variables together gives $$ (6mn)(m)(9n)=54m^2n^2 $$ The answer is A.
